item.title: A #mural by Dutch #artist Judith de Leeuw shows the Statue o…
item.author: Butterflies Katz ⓥ (@butterflieskatz.bsky.social)
item.description:
A #mural by Dutch #artist Judith de Leeuw shows the Statue of Liberty covering her eyes (in shame) in Roubaix, France (in 2025, just before July 4th).

Judith de Leeuw, also known as JDL #StreetArt, creates #murals worldwide (41 countries) to draw attention to social issues. info@jdlstreetart.com
item.content:encoded:
A #mural by Dutch #artist Judith de Leeuw shows the Statue of Liberty covering her eyes (in shame) in Roubaix, France (in 2025, just before July 4th).

Judith de Leeuw, also known as JDL #StreetArt, creates #murals worldwide (41 countries) to draw attention to social issues. info@jdlstreetart.com

item.title: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naru…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naruto! ngl Naruto was such an awesome anime 🥹 it was filled with a ton of cool fight scenes, and it also had some comfy moments too 😊 it's one of my childhood favorites! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naruto! ngl Naruto was such an awesome anime 🥹 it was filled with a ton of cool fight scenes, and it also had some comfy moments too 😊 it's one of my childhood favorites! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: 6月29日 月曜日☁☀️ 室温30.2℃ ３連勤終了なり。。。 明日は休みなり。。 今日も暑かった〜🫠 梅雨の晴れ間は…
item.author: 菊理（くくり）スランプ脱出中 (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
6月29日 月曜日☁☀️
室温30.2℃
３連勤終了なり。。。
明日は休みなり。。
今日も暑かった〜🫠
梅雨の晴れ間はいいけど、暑すぎる…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
item.content:encoded:
6月29日 月曜日☁☀️
室温30.2℃
３連勤終了なり。。。
明日は休みなり。。
今日も暑かった〜🫠
梅雨の晴れ間はいいけど、暑すぎる…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵

item.author: Hanachu (@dokikawahanachu.bsky.social)
item.description:
今日は旦那の誕生日なので、彼が好きな刀語の絵を描きました。(*´∀｀)

It's my hubby birthday so I drew his favourite, Katanagatari !

#art #artsky #fanart #katanagatari
#アナログ絵

item.title: 暑いけど風はあるし日陰で座っているとめっぽう気持ちいい。
item.author: Расэндзин@6/17馬車馬大作戦新装版発売 (@rasenjin.bsky.social)
item.description: 暑いけど風はあるし日陰で座っているとめっぽう気持ちいい。
item.content:encoded: 暑いけど風はあるし日陰で座っているとめっぽう気持ちいい。

item.title: I watched Garden of Remembrance! The movie was 18m long. Thi…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I watched Garden of Remembrance! The movie was 18m long. This was a cool experience! The movie told its story entirely through music and visuals, it was unique and well executed! The soundtrack was nice as well, and the art style was beautiful with a vibrant color palette! It was a pleasant movie 😊
item.content:encoded: I watched Garden of Remembrance! The movie was 18m long. This was a cool experience! The movie told its story entirely through music and visuals, it was unique and well executed! The soundtrack was nice as well, and the art style was beautiful with a vibrant color palette! It was a pleasant movie 😊

item.title: #今月描いた絵を晒そう #fanart ファンアートと絵日記でしたね。 連れ歩きポケ絵は羽成お気に入りです☺️（遊んでく…
item.author: 羽成ふみ✍🏻お通販開店中（6月いっぱいまで） (@tokeruwakusei.bsky.social)
item.description:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう　#fanart
ファンアートと絵日記でしたね。
連れ歩きポケ絵は羽成お気に入りです☺️（遊んでくださってありがとうございました。）ステゴは次回があればもっと手癖もりもりで挑んでみたいです…。
item.content:encoded:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう　#fanart
ファンアートと絵日記でしたね。
連れ歩きポケ絵は羽成お気に入りです☺️（遊んでくださってありがとうございました。）ステゴは次回があればもっと手癖もりもりで挑んでみたいです…。

item.title: ‎なっ…なんと ‎娘達にブルスカ投稿を見られた💦 ‎ ‎そして…説教💦 ‎ ‎『何よ！ ‎たかがイタズラDMで …
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎なっ…なんと
‎娘達にブルスカ投稿を見られた💦
‎
‎そして…説教💦
‎
‎『何よ！
‎たかがイタズラDMで
引っ込むなよ〜』
‎
‎『男でしょうよ！』
‎
‎✳️あんたら女でしょ？
‎
‎『でも…
毘沙門天はイケて無いね』
‎
‎『私はもっと可愛らしいよね…』
‎
‎✳️自分で言えるツワモノすぎる💦
‎
‎長女の言葉が強烈だった…
‎
‎『お父さん、
家族愛を堂々と言えることは
‎カッコいいよ』
‎
‎『負けるな
私のスーパーお父さん！』
‎
‎そして…焼肉を奢らされた💦

よー高い肉を食べるの〜🤣
✳️ダイエット中では😆
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎なっ…なんと
‎娘達にブルスカ投稿を見られた💦
‎
‎そして…説教💦
‎
‎『何よ！
‎たかがイタズラDMで
引っ込むなよ〜』
‎
‎『男でしょうよ！』
‎
‎✳️あんたら女でしょ？
‎
‎『でも…
毘沙門天はイケて無いね』
‎
‎『私はもっと可愛らしいよね…』
‎
‎✳️自分で言えるツワモノすぎる💦
‎
‎長女の言葉が強烈だった…
‎
‎『お父さん、
家族愛を堂々と言えることは
‎カッコいいよ』
‎
‎『負けるな
私のスーパーお父さん！』
‎
‎そして…焼肉を奢らされた💦

よー高い肉を食べるの〜🤣
✳️ダイエット中では😆
‎
‎

item.title: NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the federal government owes tribes water, but Native American communities in northern Arizona are still fighting for their rights to the Colorado River.

With @kjzz.org
item.content:encoded:
NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the federal government owes tribes water, but Native American communities in northern Arizona are still fighting for their rights to the Colorado River.

With @kjzz.org

item.title: Happy Monday! It's a new week! We had a somewhat quiet sunri…
item.author: Paul Gundlach (@paulsgundlach.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Monday! It's a new week! We had a somewhat quiet sunrise today but as the sun was still emerging from the clouds a nicely defined shimmer path materialized. Tap for full size, particularly since it's a vertical. I hope you have a great day!
item.content:encoded: Happy Monday! It's a new week! We had a somewhat quiet sunrise today but as the sun was still emerging from the clouds a nicely defined shimmer path materialized. Tap for full size, particularly since it's a vertical. I hope you have a great day!

item.title: Two things are true. The World Cup is the greatest sportin…
item.author: Dunning-Kruger Industries (@bbroke7.bsky.social)
item.description:
Two things are true.

The World Cup is the greatest sporting event. The fans, players, locals, and camaraderie make it so.

FIFA is the most corrupt sporting organization on the planet and they have only gotten worse despite everyone knowing.

Demand better from the people that control it

T
item.content:encoded:
Two things are true.

The World Cup is the greatest sporting event. The fans, players, locals, and camaraderie make it so.

FIFA is the most corrupt sporting organization on the planet and they have only gotten worse despite everyone knowing.

Demand better from the people that control it

T

item.title: 🔆🦋 happy new week 🫧 love joy & gratitude to all 💛🩷🧡🤍
item.author: 💙🪄 Keep Rising 🪄💙 (@keeprising.bsky.social)
item.description:
🔆🦋 happy new week 🫧 love
joy & gratitude to all 💛🩷🧡🤍
item.content:encoded:

item.title: For those who don’t follow sports and haven’t really had the…
item.author: 🍁🇨🇦Team Canada Forever🇨🇦🍁 (@teamcanadaforever.bsky.social)
item.description:
For those who don’t follow sports and haven’t really had the opportunity to get to know Canada men’s national football team head coach Jesse Marsch, he is probably one of the few Americans who addressed the insulting “51st state” rhetoric head-on since day one.

❤️🍁🇨🇦TEAM CANADA FOREVER🇨🇦🍁❤️
1/3 🧵
item.content:encoded:
For those who don’t follow sports and haven’t really had the opportunity to get to know Canada men’s national football team head coach Jesse Marsch, he is probably one of the few Americans who addressed the insulting “51st state” rhetoric head-on since day one.

❤️🍁🇨🇦TEAM CANADA FOREVER🇨🇦🍁❤️
1/3 🧵

item.title: Sen. Chris Coons, has been taken to the hospital and treated…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Sen. Chris Coons, has been taken to the hospital and treated for what his office calls minor injuries after a multi-car crash.
item.content:encoded: Sen. Chris Coons, has been taken to the hospital and treated for what his office calls minor injuries after a multi-car crash.

item.title: One of the most successful pedestrian streets in the world, …
item.author: Brent Toderian (@brenttoderian.bsky.social)
item.description: One of the most successful pedestrian streets in the world, the Strøget in Copenhagen, was filled with cars until a 2 year pedestrianization pilot project in 1962. The opposition argued “no cars means no business,” but the street has been a massive retail success, the city’s busiest shopping street.
item.content:encoded: One of the most successful pedestrian streets in the world, the Strøget in Copenhagen, was filled with cars until a 2 year pedestrianization pilot project in 1962. The opposition argued “no cars means no business,” but the street has been a massive retail success, the city’s busiest shopping street.
